title: Film Analysis
description: Vocabulary of cinema: mise-en-scène, cinematography, pacing, subtext, character arc.
summary_pt_br: Análise de filme: mise-en-scène, cinematografia, ritmo, subtexto, arco do personagem.

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary of cinema: mise-en-scène, cinematography, pacing, subtext, character arc.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Análise de filme: mise-en-scène, cinematografia, ritmo, subtexto, arco do personagem.

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary of cinema: mise-en-scène, cinematography, pacing, subtext, character arc. Focus: film analysis. The film's mise-en-scène reveals the character's isolation.
scenes.text_pt: Análise de filme: mise-en-scène, cinematografia, ritmo, subtexto, arco do personagem. Foco: film analysis. A mise-en-scène revela o isolamento do personagem.

scenes.title: Film Analysis
scenes.body_en: Core terms: MISE-EN-SCÈNE (everything in the frame). CINEMATOGRAPHY (how the camera sees). PACING (how time feels). SUBTEXT (unsaid meaning). CHARACTER ARC (internal change).
scenes.body_pt: Análise de filme: mise-en-scène, cinematografia, ritmo, subtexto, arco do personagem.

examples.en: The film's mise-en-scène reveals the character's isolation.
examples.pt: A mise-en-scène revela o isolamento do personagem.

examples.en: Subtle cinematography shifts underline the protagonist's change.
examples.pt: Mudanças sutis na cinematografia marcam a mudança do protagonista.

examples.en: The pacing slows deliberately in the final act.
examples.pt: O ritmo desacelera propositalmente no ato final.

exercise.question: Complete: "The film's mise-en-scène reveals the ___ isolation."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The film's mise-en-scène reveals the character's isolation."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A mise-en-scène revela o isolamento do personagem.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Subtle cinematography shifts underline the protagonist's change.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Subtle cinematography shifts underline the protagonist's change."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Mudanças sutis na cinematografia marcam a mudança do protagonista.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Film Analysis — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre film analysis. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What made the film's opening so powerful?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The mise-en-scène alone told her whole story.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It moved from cold tones to warm ones slowly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What about the pacing in the second act?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Her silence screams louder than her words.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: She moves from fear to quiet conviction.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Cinema is literature that uses silence as punctuation.

scenes.title: The film club
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Analyze the film's style. Use at least three cinema terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In Dona Lúcia's living room, the film club gathered to debate the week's screening with careful vocabulary.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: The opening sequence's mise-en-scène told us everything about her loneliness before a single line of dialogue.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: The cinematography shifted from cold blues to warm ambers exactly as her conviction strengthened on screen.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Pacing slowed deliberately in the final act, giving the audience time to arrive at her silent decision.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: The subtext of her silence carried more weight than any monologue could have accomplished in that scene.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Good films, Lúcia would say, trust their viewers. Great films educate them in the trust itself.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Film Analysis". Vocabulary of cinema: mise-en-scène, cinematography, pacing, subtext, character arc. The film's mise-en-scène reveals the character's isolation. Subtle cinematography shifts underline the protagonist's change. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Film Analysis". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
